description_long: This sculpture depicts two intertwined human figures seated on a rough, block-like base, rendered in a white stone material. The figures are engaged in an intimate embrace, with one figure sitting and the other leaning in, their arms and heads closely connected. The anatomical details are finely sculpted, with visible musculature and naturalistic body proportions, while the base remains roughly hewn, contrasting with the smoothness of the figures. The sculpture sits atop a layered, rectangular plinth that appears to be made of a different, more textured material. The overall composition conveys a sense of tenderness and unity, with the figures' forms merging into one another. The work is evocative of classical or romantic styles, focusing on human emotion and connection.
description: A white stone sculpture of two human figures embracing, seated on a rough block base atop a layered plinth. The figures are finely detailed and intertwined, conveying intimacy and unity.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures' faces and the intimate embrace, with the seated figure's legs and arms clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the back and profile of the embracing figures, with the rough base and layered plinth more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back and shoulders of the figures, with the rough, unfinished texture of the base most visible.
description_view_3: Oblique rear view showing the back of the seated figure and the side of the plinth, emphasizing the sculpture's depth and mass.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures in an intimate embrace
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a neutral background.
